rewritePrinciple: Rewrite Topic 2 from NCDC evidence. Handle each physical feature separately and in detail, but keep learner modules focused and P7-appropriate. Use maps/atlases for countries/locations where NCDC requires them but does not provide full tables.

recommendedModules.title: Physical Features, Relief and Drainage
requiredTeachingPoints: Difference between relief features and drainage features.
Mountains and highlands are relief features.

recommendedModules.title: Major Mountains and Highlands of Africa
requiredTeachingPoints: The Atlas, Drakensberg, Cameroon highlands, Jos plateau, Ahaggar, Tibesti, Ethiopian highlands.
Mention countries where possible using atlas/reference support.
recommendedModules.extraSourceReason: NCDC lists feature names and requires countries where located, but does not give all countries in the extracted pages.

recommendedModules.title: Value and Map Practice for Mountains and Highlands
requiredTeachingPoints: Use map work to locate mountains and highlands.
Draw/model features and discuss how they influence people's lives.

officialSubtopicBlueprint.officialSubtopic: Plateau, rift valley and coastal plains
Formation of major physical features of Africa
